title: Retired Dev Studio Bridge Runner
summary: Removed the old bin/dev-studio bridge runner and local Jekyll overlay, made bin/local-studio own Local Studio startup directly, and kept public Jekyll preview/build on explicit public-site commands.
effect: Local Studio startup no longer depends on a combined Studio/Jekyll bridge. Studio runs through `bin/local-studio`, public preview/build run through `bin/public-site-preview` and `bin/public-site-build`, and stale dev-studio command/config references have been removed from active docs and UI copy.
verification: python3 -m py_compile scripts/studio/audit_runner.py scripts/studio/studio_audit_api.py scripts/studio/studio_app_server.py scripts/run_checks.py
DOCS_WATCH_ENABLED=0 DOTLINEFORM_BACKUP_RETENTION=off CATALOGUE_STARTUP_LOOKUP_REBUILD=off STUDIO_APP_PORT=8776 bin/local-studio; curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8776/health
